3093750.name: Gamble Lair
3093750.description:
About

Gamble Lair is a sinister twist on Rock–Paper–Scissors — a game of death where your life is measured in tokens, turning chance into pure strategy.

Face Kinger, the House’s cruel champion, in high-stakes duels where every turn forces you to wager your survival. Your tokens are both your health and your currency. Lose them all, and you die.

As the rounds progress, the House itself intervenes, introducing streak multipliers, sudden death rounds, and shifting rules that make each match deadlier than the last.

Your goal is simple: bankrupt Kinger before he bankrupts you.

  • Rock–Paper–Scissors like you’ve never seen before — open hands, betting, and mind games

  • Tokens are your life and your wallet — gamble them or save them for perks

  • Cursed tools and perks reshape every duel

  • Short, brutal runs with multiple endings to uncover

  • Online PvP mode to wager your survival against real opponents

RPS reimagined — a game of chance transformed into a game of strategy.
3093750.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
